headline: Chip Rout Drags Nasdaq 100 Lower, Oil Climbs: Stock Market Today
summary: A deepening chipmaker slide pulls all major U.S. indexes lower Tuesday while oil climbs on a Strait of Hormuz strike and defensive sectors led the tape.
